EventData.Data:
Category: Microsoft.AspNetCore.DataProtection.KeyManagement.XmlKeyManager EventId: 35
No XML encryptor configured. Key {577c28dc-6dbb-49f7-9e96-c13fc86e8638} may be persisted to storage in unencrypted form.

Category: TaskPlanner.Application.Main.BacklogApplication EventId: 0 SpanId: 131d85c3a37980b3 TraceId: 5e27e1f4567db38105a1ab171c239871 ParentId: 976a093349d7e6bc RequestId: 4000495a-0004-ed00-b63f-84710c7967bb RequestPath: /api/proccess/Backlog/BacklogList ActionId: ba53b7ad-213e-4bae-bc0b-aa50df2dcf41 ActionName: TaskPlanner.Api.Controllers.BacklogController.BacklogList (TaskPlanner.Api)
Connection Timeout Expired. The timeout period elapsed during the post-login phase. The connection could have timed out while waiting for server to complete the login process and respond; Or it could have timed out while attempting to create multiple active connections. The duration spent while attempting to connect to this server was - [Pre-Login] initialization=431; handshake=204; [Login] initialization=1; authentication=31; [Post-Login] complete=14106;

Category: TaskPlanner.Application.Main.PlanificacionApplication EventId: 0 SpanId: fbd484813f5c761a TraceId: 5e27e1f4567db38105a1ab171c239871 ParentId: 9ea52fc03ee41357 RequestId: 40003a38-0004-fd00-b63f-84710c7967bb RequestPath: /api/proccess/Planificacion/PlanificacionList ActionId: f19489f8-eff8-445d-a7f7-75318bc9875d ActionName: TaskPlanner.Api.Controllers.PlanificacionController.PlanificacionList (TaskPlanner.Api)
Connection Timeout Expired. The timeout period elapsed during the post-login phase. The connection could have timed out while waiting for server to complete the login process and respond; Or it could have timed out while attempting to create multiple active connections. The duration spent while attempting to connect to this server was - [Pre-Login] initialization=67; handshake=191; [Login] initialization=0; authentication=0; [Post-Login] complete=14000;

Category: TaskPlanner.Application.Main.BacklogApplication EventId: 0 SpanId: 202032b018d27ea7 TraceId: 067dea7a4541e18b6e1cb405823066e4 ParentId: 482a7e0f5a7ef85d RequestId: 40003c34-0006-ef00-b63f-84710c7967bb RequestPath: /api/proccess/Backlog/BacklogList ActionId: ba53b7ad-213e-4bae-bc0b-aa50df2dcf41 ActionName: TaskPlanner.Api.Controllers.BacklogController.BacklogList (TaskPlanner.Api)
Connection Timeout Expired. The timeout period elapsed during the post-login phase. The connection could have timed out while waiting for server to complete the login process and respond; Or it could have timed out while attempting to create multiple active connections. The duration spent while attempting to connect to this server was - [Pre-Login] initialization=61; handshake=176; [Login] initialization=0; authentication=0; [Post-Login] complete=14007;

No XML encryptor configured. Key {33f20b8e-a303-4354-9ac2-bfabeef2bfc1} may be persisted to storage in unencrypted form.
